items.name: styles
items.description: Plex UI design tokens and component styles (import once in app root).

items.name: button
items.description: Button component — sizes, variants, loading state.

items.name: input
items.description: Text input — sizes, variants, clearable, adornments.

items.name: card
items.description: Surface primitive with compound parts (Header/Title/Description/Content/Footer/Action), variants, sizes, and optional link mode.

items.name: menu
items.description: Dropdown menu with items, separators, submenus.

items.name: separator
items.description: Horizontal or vertical divider for sections, inline lists, and card groupings.

items.name: label
items.description: Accessible label on top of Radix Label.Root; pairs with any form control via htmlFor.

items.name: progress
items.description: Linear progress bar with determinate and indeterminate modes.

items.name: accordion
items.description: Vertically stacked collapsible panels with single/multiple expansion, per-item disabled, and controlled value.

items.name: button-group
items.description: Joined toolbar / stepper / split-button wrapper for Buttons, Inputs, and trigger controls.
